name: Kargil Town
description: The second-largest town in Ladakh, situated on the banks of the Suru River. It serves as the primary transit hub connecting Srinagar, Leh, and Zanskar.
history: The epicenter of the 1999 Kargil War between India and Pakistan.
famousFor: Gateway to Zanskar, Suru Valley, apricot orchards.
